name: Cocoa-Nut Meringue Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast and flake the coconut as directed.
2. Melt margarine in a bowl; stir in chopped pecans, cocoa, sugar, water, vanilla, and salt until combined.
3. Add egg yolks to the mixture and mix well.
4. Fold in the softened cream cheese until smooth.
5. Stir in marshmallow creme until incorporated.
6. Pour into prepared crust and bake at 350°F (175°C) for desired time or until set.
